binary_security.notes: NO STACK CANARIES — any buffer overflow is potentially exploitable

key_findings.desc: h1_do_not_close_on_insecure_t_e weakens TE+CL smuggling defense
NUL bytes in header values accepted with accept-unsafe-violations
Non-token chars in header names accepted with accept-unsafe-violations
Response status code uint16_t wrapping (no digit limit)
CVE-2021-40346 FULLY PATCHED
CVE-2023-40225 FULLY PATCHED
CVE-2023-25725 FULLY PATCHED
HPACK get_var_int() shift overflow — UB when shift >= 32
VLA stack allocation + no stack canaries
CONTINUATION flood mitigation disabled by default (glitch threshold=0)
SETTINGS flood — no rate limiting
H2-to-H1 smuggling protections comprehensive
QPACK varint shift overflow — UB when shift > 63 on uint64_t
CRYPTO frame offset+len overflow → underflow in partial overlap path — PRE-AUTH REACHABLE
STREAM frame offset+len overflow (missing RFC 9000 4.5 check)
Transport param preferred address CID length check INVERTED
CRYPTO frame missing offset+len > 2^62 check per RFC 9000
ACK delay calculation integer overflow (uint64 << 20)
ACK frame gap+2 overflow bypasses validation
ACK delay uses wrong exponent direction (correctness bug)
No Lua sandbox — os.execute, io.open, debug.* all available
Lua CLI commands have no access level enforcement
show env exposes all environment variables at operator level
mystrtod() reads past buffer bounds on non-null-terminated input
CVE-2025-11230 PATCHED (MJSON_MAX_DEPTH=20)

bare_lf_injection.desc: Bare LF (\n without \r) accepted as header line terminator — header injection vector
bare_lf_injection.impact: Backend sees X-Test: before AND Injected: evil as separate headers

version_disclosure.desc: Full version info on CLI socket (show info), Prometheus metrics unauthenticated

zero_day_candidates.desc: CRYPTO frame offset+len overflow → underflow in partial overlap handler
zero_day_candidates.attack_vector: Send Initial QUIC packet with CRYPTO frame having offset near UINT64_MAX and small len
zero_day_candidates.expected_impact: Integer underflow in diff calculation → large len → memcpy OOB read/write

zero_day_candidates.desc: QPACK/HPACK varint shift overflow → undefined behavior → potential garbage values used as indices/lengths
